creator: pjfloyd@wanadoo.fr
text:
With a trivial asan application I get no problems at startup but then it hangs when the guest starts to execute. Under gdb it seems to be hanging in a (host) call to madvise during the (guest) sanitizer initialization, calling __sanitizer::DontDumpShadowMemory.

I think that this not worth trying to fix. 

You can try logging a bug upstream at https://bugs.kde.org/ but I very much doubt that anyone else will want to work on it.
